Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 12th, 2008 (Limited) by Miramax
December 25th, 2008 (Expands Wide) by Miramax
Video Release: April 7th, 2009 by Miramax Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material
Running Time: 104 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Bigotry, Catholic, Child Abuse, Dysfunctional Family, LGBTQ+, Monks and Nuns, Religious

Source:Based on Play
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
